ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issue_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the metric is for */,
  "readability_score" REAL /* Readability score of the issue description */,
  "clarity_score" REAL /* Clarity score of the issue description */,
  "conciseness_score" REAL /* Conciseness score of the issue description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_tagging" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag record */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the tag is assigned to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each metric record
ID of the issue the metric is for
